title: agrostis glabrata
intro: Agrostis glabrata, also known as smooth bentgrass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to the temperate regions of the Northern Hemisphere, where it can be found growing in wetlands, meadows, and along streams. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The leaves of the plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and poultices, which have been used to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
